description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior is clad in brown brickwork, with large rectangular windows on the ground floor and smaller, symmetrically placed windows on the upper level. The front facade includes a prominent arched entryway with a covered porch, flanked by decorative columns and a sign above the entrance. The property is enclosed by a low brick and metal fence, with a gate at the front and a small landscaped area with trees on one side. The roof includes open sections, possibly for terraces or skylights, and the overall layout suggests a spacious, urban residential dwelling. The house is set back from the street, providing a sense of privacy and security.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent arched entryway, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, covered porch, and main gate with fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick facade, large ground-floor window, and tree landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible trees, secondary entrance, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing symmetrical window placement and a clear view of the flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large ground-floor windows and smaller upper windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entryway with covered porch, decorative columns, and a sign above the door
